title: Flexi / Locum Occupational Therapist - Singaporean/PR only
description:
We are recruiting Locum Occupational Therapist/ Senior Occupational Therapist for various healthcare institution in the intermediate and long-term care (ILTC) sector.


Roles and Responsibilities:

  • Assess the client's Activities of Daily Living (ADL), Instrumental ADL (IADL), leisure abilities, functional status, cognition, perception and psychosocial status.
  • Set suitable therapeutic goals and develop and implement suitable intervention plans for the client.
  • Conduct trainings to TAs as and when required to ensure competent implementation of your intervention plans and wheelchair transfers etc.
  • Provide advice on the use of orthosis, prothesis or assistive / adaptive devices to maintain or improve ADL performances.
  • Conduct home assessment and recommendations on home modification (if required).
  • Provide caregiver training and patient education.
  • Plan and implement community integration activities.

Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma in Occupational Therapy
  • Full AHPC Registration
  • At least 2 years of experience working in a healthcare setting
  • Passionate about Occupational Therapy
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills
  • Fluency in local languages will be an advantage
  • Self-motivated to engage in continuous learning and education in the field of Occupational Therapy

SG Rehab Recruitment Division

  • Email: hr@sgrehab.com
  • Web: www.sgrehab.com
  • Company Registration No.: 201435598H | EA Licence No.: 17C8839

SG REHAB: Wherever you are, we take you further.

Should you be a good fit for this role, apply now and we will be in touch with you shortly to advance your application. Kindly note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
SG Rehab is a headhunting and recruitment firm serving the local healthcare sphere. We specialize in the placement of Occupational Therapists, Physiotherapists and Speech Therapists in both full-time and locum positions with healthcare organizations across the whole spectrum of healthcare settings islandwide.

We are in the line of people. And that is why we place people at the heart of all our processes. Between “Human” and “Resource”, we believe “Human” is more important. When we are Human about our processes, the Resource will care for itself.
